name: Grilled Sesame Seeds Steak Strips with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef sirloin, cut into thin strips
2 large Green peppers, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, combine soy sauce, sesame seeds, white wine, chopped onions, garlic, and ground ginger in a blender jar. Blend well.
2. Place the meat in a large glass or enamel bowl and pour the marinade over it. Marinate for several hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Just before cooking, remove the meat from the marinade and drain any excess liquid. Reserve the marinade.
4. Thread the meat onto skewers, alternating with green pepper pieces, cherry tomatoes, and mushroom caps.
5. Brush the skewers with cooking oil.
6. Grill the skewers to your desired doneness, basting several times with the reserved marinade during cooking.
7. Serve the remaining marinade as a sauce at the table.
